description: French anarchist group active in France and Belgium from 1911 to 1912. Composed of illegalist anarchists, they pioneered motorized robberies and bank raids using cars and repeating rifles. Led by Jules Bonnot, the gang engaged in a series of high-profile crimes before being dismantled by police.

country_links.evidence_quote: The Bonnot Gang ... was a French anarchist group that operated in France and Belgium during the late Belle Époque from 1911 to 1912.
country_links.context: The Bonnot Gang operated in Belgium during its crime spree.
